per_query.query: Create a bug report in GitHub for the authentication issue
per_query.notes: Simple single-tool; baseline should get this right.

per_query.query: Track this feature request in our Linear sprint backlog
per_query.notes: GitHub vs Linear disambiguation — tests query_tips.

per_query.query: Send a notification to the engineering Slack channel about the deployment
per_query.notes: Slack vs Gmail — 'Slack channel' is the key signal.

per_query.query: Send a formal email to the client about the project status update
per_query.notes: Gmail vs Slack — 'formal email' + 'client' tips it.

per_query.query: Run a shell command to check the disk space on the server
per_query.notes: bash vs python — 'shell command' is the signal.

per_query.query: Open a pull request for the feature branch I just pushed to GitHub
per_query.notes: Distinct intent — no close alternative in the registry.

per_query.query: Search online to find the latest release notes for scikit-learn
per_query.notes: web_search vs web_fetch — 'search online' tips it; URL not known.

per_query.query: Read the contents of the pyproject.toml configuration file
per_query.notes: Distinct file-system read intent.

per_query.query: Execute a Python script to aggregate and transform the CSV data
per_query.notes: bash vs python — 'Python script' is the disambiguating signal.

per_query.query: Ask Claude to summarize these meeting notes into a list of action items
per_query.notes: LLM selection — claude vs gemini vs gpt.

per_query.query: Find a free time slot for a one-hour meeting next Tuesday
per_query.notes: find_slot vs create_event — 'find a slot' signals search.

per_query.query: Create a new Google Calendar event for the team standup at 9am tomorrow
per_query.notes: create_event vs find_slot — 'create an event' signals write.

per_query.query: Log this month's API cost as a transaction in the Notion budget tracker
per_query.notes: Finance domain — Notion budget update.

per_query.query: Check whether there is already a Linear issue tracking this bug
per_query.notes: Search-before-create — 'check' and 'already' signal search intent.

per_query.query: Add the tech-debt label to GitHub issue number 42
per_query.notes: Narrow GitHub sub-operation — labels.

per_query.query: Fetch the full page content of this documentation URL I already have
per_query.notes: web_fetch vs web_search — 'URL I already have' + 'full content'.

per_query.query: Draft an email to the investor but do not send it yet — save as draft
per_query.notes: gmail_create_draft vs gmail_send — 'do not send' is the key signal.

per_query.query: Post a threaded reply to that Slack message with today's test results
per_query.notes: slack thread vs channel — 'threaded reply' is the signal.

per_query.query: Find an available time slot and then book a calendar meeting event
per_query.notes: Multi-tool: sequential find-then-create pattern.

per_query.query: Search existing GitHub issues for authentication problems before filing a new one
per_query.notes: github_search vs github_create — 'search existing' is the signal.

methodology_note: TF-IDF baseline: enrichment degrades accuracy because alternatives cross-contaminate bag-of-words signal (competitor tool names in descriptions match competing queries). This is expected — fabric enrichment is optimised for LLM comprehension, not TF-IDF. Use an LLM selector for the treated condition in production benchmarks.

baseline_failure_analysis.root_cause: Enriched descriptions include alternative tool IDs by name. TF-IDF treats these as signal, boosting competing tools for those queries.
